notes: Rich and well-formed: the recursion uses union (atomic and binary cases -> def:union), set difference (quantifier cases FV \ {x} -> def:set-difference), terms and their variables (def:term, def:variable), over formulas (def:formula). def:bound-free is the conceptual notion of 'free' but the recursion computes FV self-containedly, so bound-free is arguably motivational rather than computationally used -- reviewer may trim. Kept as-is.
